name: HMS Prospect (T 282)
events: 27 Apr 1945 Around 1730 B/27, HMS Unrivalled (Lt. R.P. Fitzgerald, DSC, RN) returned to Plymouth. She was escorted to Plymouth by HMS Prospect (T/Lt. R.G.H. Plunket-Greene, RNVR) which had joined around 0915 B/27 coming from Morlaix, France. (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
